‹SOURCE Ultimate Wilderness/51;People of the North/24›

Vikings seek to raid "softer societies" and return with their longships filled with plunder. A viking strikes fear into the heart of her foes, and in battle she can fly into a terrible rage. Many vikings wear the pelts of bears or wolves, drawing on the strength and ferocity of these beasts in battle. Vikings do not wear heavy armor, but they are skilled at fighting with an axe or spear in conjunction with a shield.
::ab[Weapon and Armor Proficiency]{icon=down note="A viking is not proficient with heavy armor or tower shields." alter="Weapon and armor proficiencies"}

::ab[Fearsome (Ex)]{icon=power l2="A viking can attempt an Intimidate check to demoralize an opponent as a @HLmove_action." l10="She can do so as a @HLswift_action." imp18="She can attempt to demoralize a foe as a @HLfree_action once per round." replace=Bravery}

::ab[Shield Defense (Ex)]{l=3 icon=def flavor="A viking learns the art of fighting with a shield." passive="Whenever she is wearing medium, light, or no armor and using a shield, the viking's shield bonus to AC increases by 1." incrementPlain incrementAt="The shield bonus to AC now increases~7~11~15~2" incrementDesc=by replace="Armor training"}

::ab[Berserker (Ex)]{l=5 icon=power ability="A viking gains the *rage* ability as per the ‹class/barbarian› class feature, and she uses her fighter level as her barbarian level for the purposes of determining her rounds of rage, qualifying for rage powers, and determining the effects of rage powers." replace="Weapon training"}

::ab[Rage Powers (Ex)]{l=6 icon=power choice="Whenever a viking gains a fighter bonus feat, she can instead gain a single ‹ability/rage power<s›, as the barbarian class feature, in place of the bonus feat. Once selected, these rage powers cannot be changed." alter="The fighter's bonus feats"}

warlord.name: Warlord
description: ## Warlord
‹SOURCE Pathfinder Worldscape #3/26›

Honorable, fearless experts in gun and blade, warlords roam the dried seabeds of time-worn Mars, warring in great tribes for supremacy over a dying planet. Capable of relentless brutality and quick to flare into open hostilities, warlords cloak their violent ways with paens to great noble houses or honored ancient traditions, bringing an air of respectability and etiquette to the butchery of brazen blades against bare skin. Warlords eschew armor as impractical to their harsh and often desert-like environment, preferring the free movement of near-nakedness. Warlords tend to specialize in the traditional weapons of Barsoom, leaving them ignorant of even simple Weapons common on other worlds. The same impulse that guides a warlord to stick to the traditional garb and gear of his culture can lead to a single-mindedness of purpose that can propel him far within his tribe or noble house. Even warlords of low status in Martian society claim a connection, no matter how ancient, with some great chieftain or emperor, seeing in the glorious past a path to a more hopeful future. Barsoom confers noble status upon its warlords through ritual combat in the case of green Martians or on merit and upon great achievement or heroics in the case of red Martians, so climbing the ladder of status is an important part of a warlord's journey through life.
::cskill{gain=acro~kno lose=kd~swim}

::ab[Weapon and Armor Proficiency]{icon=power-down note="A warlord is proficient with the ‹eq-weapon/halberd›, ‹eq-weapon/radium pistol›, ‹eq-weapon/rapier›, ‹eq-weapon/radium rifle›, ‹eq-weapon/longspear›, ‹eq-weapon/longsword›, ‹eq-weapon/shortspear›, ‹eq-weapon/spear›, ‹eq-weapon/Thark rifle›, ‹eq-weapon/trident›, and ‹eq-weapon/whip›. Warlords are not proficient with armor or shields." replace="Weapon and armor proficiencies"}

::ab[Evasive Dueling (Ex)]{icon=def choice="Whenever he would gain a bonus combat feat, a warlord can instead add a +1 dodge bonus to his Armor Class. The dodge bonus does not apply when wearing any armor, when using a shield, or when carrying a medium or heavier load." alter="Bonus combat feats"}

::ab[Battle Bravado (Ex)]{l=3 icon=def flavor="The warlord's self confidence and force of will make him more difficult to hit." passive="When unarmored and unencumbered. the warlord adds his Charisma bonus (if any) to his AC and his CMD." imp7="The warlord gains a +1 dodge bonus." imp11="The warlord gains another +1 dodge bonus." imp15="The warlord again gains a +1 dodge bonus." special="He loses these bonuses when he wears any armor, when he carries a shield, or when he carries a medium or heavy load." replace="Armor training"}
:::ab{title="Weapon Training (Ex)" l=5 action=Ability icon=power }
A warlord adds the following ‹ability/weapon group<s› to those he can choose from when using weapon training.
@HL[Barsoomian:] Halberd, radium pistol, rapier, radium rifle, longspear, longsword, shortspear, spear, Thark rifle, trident, whip.
::ab[Sun-Bronzed Skin (Ex)]{l=19 icon=def passive="The warlord gains DR 5/- whenever he is not wearing armor or using a shield." replace="Armor mastery"}

weapon_bearer_squire.name: Weapon Bearer Squire
description: ## Weapon Bearer Squire
‹SOURCE Knights of the Inner Sea/21›
With myriad weapons, armor, and useful gear always on hand, the weapon bearer squire ensures her knight is equipped for any task.

::ab[Weapon Rack (Ex)]{l=1 icon=power order=mi move="Once per round, a knight can retrieve an item carried by his weapon bearer squire." immediate="A weapon bearer squire can pick up items dropped by her knight." special="These abilities do not provoke attacks of opportunity. The knight and the weapon bearer squire must be adjacent to each other and must both be able to move and communicate to use these abilities." replace="The 1st-level fighter bonus combat feat"}

::ab[Swift Sharpening (Ex)]{l=2 icon=power flavor="A weapon bearer squire can quickly hone her lord's weapons to make them more effective in combat." fullround="A weapon bearer squire can use a ‹eq-misc/whetstone› to sharpen a weapon she is holding, granting whoever wields the weapon a +1 circumstance bonus on his next attack roll with that weapon." standard="She can apply a ‹eq-misc/weapon blanch<_adamantine› to a weapon she is holding. (This is normally a full-round action.)" order=rs replace="The 2nd-level fighter bonus combat feat"}

::ab[Combat Repairs (Ex)]{l=3 icon=power flavor="A weapon bearer squire can ensure her liege never goes unarmed, even if his weapon has all but shattered." fullround="A weapon bearer squire can make rapid repairs to a weapon she is holding and is proficient with by succeeding at a DC 20 Craft (weapons) check. The item does not regain any hit points, but loses the ‹misc/broken› condition for a number of rounds equal to the weapon bearer squire's class level." replace="Armor training 1"}

weapon_master.name: Weapon Master
description: ## Weapon Master
‹SOURCE Advanced Player's Guide/109›
Devoted to the perfection of a single weapon, the weapon master's meditations upon his favored weapon border on the obsessive, but none can deny his consummate skill.
::ab[Chosen Weapon]{icon=info choice="The weapon master must select a single type of weapon (such as longsword or shortbow). All of his abilities apply to that weapon type."}

::ab[Weapon Guard (Ex)]{l=2 icon=def passive="A weapon master gains a +1 bonus to CMD against ‹rule/disarm› and ‹rule/sunder› attempts while wielding his chosen weapon. This bonus also applies on saves against any effect that targets his chosen weapon (for example, ‹spell/grease›, ‹spell/heat metal›, ‹spell/shatter›, ‹spell/warp wood›)." increment="The bonus~2~4" replace=Bravery}

::ab[Weapon Training (Ex)]{l=3 icon=boost passive="A weapon master gains a +1 bonus on attack and damage rolls with his chosen weapon." increment="The bonus~3~4" replace="Armor training 1, 2, 3, and 4"}

::ab[Reliable Strike (Ex)]{l=5 icon=roll immediate="A weapon master may reroll an attack roll, critical hit confirmation roll, miss chance check, or damage roll. He must accept the second roll even if it is worse." useInc=fighter~5 useF="5~1" replace="Weapon training 1"}
::ab[Mirror Move (Ex)]{l=9 icon=def passive="A weapon master gains his weapon training bonus as an insight bonus to AC when attacked by his chosen weapon." replace="Weapon training 2"}

::ab[Deadly Critical (Ex)]{l=13 icon=boost immediate="When a weapon master confirms a critical hit with his chosen weapon, he can increase the weapon's damage multiplier by +1." useInc=fighter~3~13 useF="13~1~3" replace="Weapon training 3"}
::ab[Critical Specialist (Ex)]{l=17 icon=boost passive="The save DCs of any effects caused by a critical hit with a weapon master's chosen weapon increase by +4." replace="Weapon training 4"}

::ab[Unstoppable Strike (Ex)]{l=19 icon=lower standard="A weapon master can make one attack with his chosen weapon as a touch attack that ignores damage reduction (or hardness, if attacking an object)." replace="Armor mastery"}
